# [Volt LSP] DSP QC rejection handling

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: December 20, 2024 4:22 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: January 3, 2025 4:44 PM
Owner: Saksham Srivastava

# **What problem are we solving?**

Post an application is submitted by the LSP, DSP checks data and policy adherence sanity of the customer application on the QC (Quality check) step. 

For applications rejected in QC the current SOP for the customer requires customer to be manually moved back to the needed step in the application. This is non ideal because of the-

1. High effort for tech ops to move back the customer. 
2. High TAT for the customer to get unblocked. 

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

Customer step update

- Basis the utility list sent by DSP, mark the associated steps in the application “pending”.
- Delete the associated data for the user to complete the steps in application again.
- When customer reopens the app or refreshes page customer, customer should be moved back to the first step in the journey that has been marked pending.
- Customer should only be required to complete the steps marked pending in the application.

Communications to the customer

- Customers should be sent communication in case their application is moved back, this will ensure that they come back to the application and take the necessary actions to complete the application.
- Event: As soon as we get the callback that the QC is rejected.
- List of steps to be sent -
    - KYC, Additional details in KYC, Selfie verification, Bank verification, Mandate setup, Agreement sign.
    - If more than one steps are required to be completed, then send the list of steps in the following format: “Step1, Step2, Step3, … and LastStep.” . Example, if KYC, mandate and Agreement need to be completed again then the following will be sent in comms, “KYC, Mandate setup, and Agreement sign”.
- Template name in wati: dsp_qc_rejection_v1

![Screenshot 2024-12-31 at 4.18.08 PM.png](%5BVolt%20LSP%5D%20DSP%20QC%20rejection%20handling/Screenshot_2024-12-31_at_4.18.08_PM.png)

![Screenshot 2024-12-31 at 4.18.10 PM.png](%5BVolt%20LSP%5D%20DSP%20QC%20rejection%20handling/Screenshot_2024-12-31_at_4.18.10_PM.png)

Email

Template ID: d-0b8601f09b9a4cb187465bb91c76e793

![image.png](%5BVolt%20LSP%5D%20DSP%20QC%20rejection%20handling/image.png)

LSQ changes

- Create another stage called lead stage called “DSP QC Rejected”. This will communicate to the sales team for which customers QC has been rejected.
- Create a new lead field which will have Name of the steps that the customer needs to re-do to resubmit their application. This should be a free text field
